title: astragalus trifoliolatus
intro: Astragalus trifoliolatus, also known as the three-leaved milk vetch, is a plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus trifoliolatus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as having anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Astragalus trifoliolatus is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
